auftragsnummer.label: Auftragsnummer
auftragsnummer.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

eingangsdatum.label: Eingangsdatum
eingangsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

kunde.label: Kunde
kunde.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Kundenverwaltung' with the id `6a2a94549cc8953c0fbcc8bc` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a2a94549cc8953c0fbcc8bc/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

fahrzeug_bezeichnung.label: Fahrzeug / Gerät
fahrzeug_bezeichnung.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

kennzeichen.label: Kennzeichen / Seriennummer
kennzeichen.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

problembeschreibung.label: Problembeschreibung
problembeschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

mitarbeiter.label: Zuständiger Mitarbeiter
mitarbeiter.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

voraussichtliche_fertigstellung.label: Voraussichtliche Fertigstellung
voraussichtliche_fertigstellung.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

status.label: Status
status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

interne_notizen.label: Interne Notizen
interne_notizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

vorname.label: Vorname
vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

nachname.label: Nachname
nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

telefon.label: Telefonnummer
telefon.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

notiz_kunde.label: Notizen zum Kunden
notiz_kunde.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).
